params.name: Adoration of Shepherds
params.description: It is considered one of the most exquisite paintings of the Birth of Christ during the Renaissance period. The scene depicts the newborn Jesus receiving the worship of shepherds at a dim cave entrance. The soft light symbolizes Christ bringing light to the world, and the Virgin Mary devoutly prays before the Holy Infant. The green of the surrounding forests and hills softens the edges of the rocky mountains. The light golden Venetian tone enhances the pastoral atmosphere in the painting, as its  …
